title: Contigency Contract Lite
description: Contigency contract is a mode from game Arknights, which greatly increase the difficulty of the game. So does it in Minecraft.
body:
If you think that your Minecraft game is too easy,you can install the mod and challenge your self.

Just create a new survival world,press [V] to open a tag seletor,where you can select tags that make the game more difficult.

Attention:selecting all tags will make the game VERY difficult, like zombie will have 100+ hearts of health.

You can press [H] to select helping tags if needed.
